notes: Requires JIRA_URL (e.g. https://company.atlassian.net), JIRA_EMAIL, and JIRA_API_TOKEN env vars. URL pattern covers both cloud (*.atlassian.net) and self-hosted Jira instances. Optional: Atlassian official MCP at https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp (HTTP transport, OAuth 2.1) — run `claude mcp add --transport http atlassian https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp` for cloud-only teams.
